description_long: This sculpture features an abstract, elongated form reminiscent of a stylized human torso, with a smooth, organic curvature and a slightly asymmetrical silhouette. The upper section tapers and curves to one side, while the lower portion broadens into a rounded base, suggesting hips or a lower body. The surface appears to be made of a warm-toned stone or bronze, with subtle variations in color and texture, mounted on a solid, dark rectangular base that resembles polished marble. The overall finish is matte with some natural-looking patina, giving it an earthy, tactile quality. The sculpture stands upright and is visually striking due to its minimalist yet expressive form. There are no visible inscriptions, plaques, or artist signatures on the object or its base.
description: An abstract, elongated sculpture with a smooth, organic form and a warm-toned surface, mounted on a dark rectangular base. The piece evokes a stylized human torso with minimalist, flowing lines.
description_view_0: The front view reveals the broad, rounded lower section and the gently curving, asymmetrical upper form, highlighting the sculpture's organic, torso-like shape.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the sculpture's slender profile and the pronounced curvature of the upper section, showing the depth and tapering of the form.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front but with a subtle central groove, further accentuating the abstracted anatomy and the smooth transition from top to base.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same slenderness and curvature as view 1, with the base and verticality of the sculpture clearly visible.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
